landing.hero_subtitle: Educational management system with gamification elements for students and teachers
landing.features_title: What can you do with ITAKAI?
landing.features_subtitle: Discover all the tools and features that transform education into a unique experience
landing.feature_gamification_desc: Points, levels, badges, and rewards system that motivates continuous learning
landing.feature_narrative_desc: Each class is a unique adventure with characters and stories that capture attention
landing.feature_teamwork_desc: Collaborative challenges and rankings that foster teamwork and constant improvement
landing.feature_analytics_desc: Advanced tools for tracking and analyzing student progress
landing.feature_access_desc: Works on any device, from anywhere in the world
landing.feature_ai_desc: Assistants that personalize learning for each student
landing.profiles_title: Choose your profile to get started
landing.about_description_1: ITAKAI is the evolution of MyClassGame, powered by Artificial Intelligence. A gamified educational platform that transforms professional training into an immersive experience.
landing.about_description_2: Automatic content generation, personalized AI assistants for each student, and predictive performance analysis. All integrated into an ecosystem where learning is an adventure.
landing.gods_subtitle: 5 AI assistants inspired by Greek gods, each an expert in their domain
landing.cta_final_subtitle: Join thousands of students who are already transforming their learning with ITAKAI

join_class_modal.description: Enter the class code provided by your teacher

join_class_modal.error_not_found: No class found with that code
join_class_modal.error_already_enrolled: You are already enrolled in this class
join_class_modal.error_generic: Error joining the class. Please try again.

invite_students_modal.description: Share this code with your students so they can join the class:

docs.title: Help Center & Documentation
docs.description: Here you can access complete guides, step-by-step tutorials, frequently asked questions, and help resources to get the most out of the ITAKAI platform.

meta.site_title: ITAKAI - The adventure of learning | Gamified Educational Platform
meta.site_description: Transform education with ITAKAI, the gamified platform that inspires, motivates, and connects students, teachers, and families. Join over 50,000 students.
meta.og_description: Gamified educational platform with AI, immersive narratives, and smart analytics.
